questionText: Does your organization assess the life cycle emissions of any of its products or services?
questionKo: 귀사는 assess the life cycle emissions of any of its products 또는 services입니까?
simpleHelp: Stakeholders are increasingly requesting companies to measure and disclose their product- and service-related emissions. Emissions are linked to every stage of the product or service life cycle - from raw material acquisition to end-of-life treatment. Understanding and measuring emissions across the life cycle can help companies focus emissions reduction efforts on the most energy intensive operations across the whole life cycle, rather than just in the production process.

options: No, but we plan to start doing so within the next two years
No, and we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years
optionsKo: No, but we plan to start doing so within the next two years
No, 및 we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years

guidance.text:
General 
Select "Yes" if you assess the life cycle emissions of any of your products or services. You will then be requested to provide further details in the following question. 
Comment (column 2) (optional) 
If you do not assess life cycle emissions, you may wish to use this column to explain why not and/or explain your plan to start doing so in the future.
guidance.textKo: 일반 Select "예" 만약 you assess the life cycle emissions of 하나 이상 of your products 또는 services. You will then be requested to provide further details in the following 문항. Comment (열 2) (optional) 만약 you do not assess life cycle emissions, you may wish to use this 열 to 그 이유를 설명 not 및/또는 explain your plan to start doing so in the future.

guidance.text:
Life cycle assessment (LCA ): A structured, comprehensive method of quantifying material- and energy-flows and their associated emissions in the life cycles of products (i.e. goods and services). Emissions assessments are a component of an LCA, but full LCAs cover all environmental impacts of a studied product.
Relationship between the life cycle emissions of products and an organization's GHG emissions inventory: The assessment of product life cycle emissions and of Scope 3 emissions serves a common purpose and often requires the same data (e.g. data collected from suppliers and other companies in the value chain). The sum of the life cycle emissions of each of a company's products, combined with additional Scope 3 categories (e.g. employee commuting, business travel, and investments), should approximate the company's total corporate GHG emissions (i.e. Scope 1 + Scope 2 + Scope 3). The Scope 3 inventory enables a company to identify the greatest GHG reduction opportunities across the entire corporate value chain, while product life cycle assessment (alternatively called the Product GHG inventory, see below) enables a company to target individual products with the greatest potential for reductions.
Product GHG inventory : A subset of an LCA that focuses only on the climate change impact (i.e. life cycle emissions). A product GHG inventory is a compilation and evaluation of the inputs, outputs, and potential GHG impacts of a product system throughout its life cycle. See the GHG Protocol's Product Life Cycle and Reporting Standard for further details.
guidance.textKo: Life cycle assessment (LCA): A structured, comprehensive method of quantifying material- 및 energy-flows 및 their associated emissions in the life cycles of products (i.e. goods 및 services). Emissions assessments are a component of an LCA, but full LCAs cover all environmental impacts of a studied product. Relationship between the life cycle emissions of products 및 an 조직의 온실가스 배출량 inventory: The assessment of product life cycle emissions 및 of Scope 3 배출량 serves a common purpose 및 often requires the same data (e.g. data collected from 공급업체 및 other companies in the 가치사슬). The sum 의 life cycle emissions of each of a company's products, combined with additional Scope 3 categories (e.g. employee commuting, business travel, 및 investments), 해야 합니다 approximate the company's total corporate 온실가스 배출량 (i.e. Scope 1 + Scope 2 + Scope 3). The Scope 3 inventory enables a company to identify the greatest GHG reduction 기회 across the entire corporate 가치사슬, while product life cycle assessment (alternatively called the Product GHG inventory, see below) enables a company to 목표 individual products with the greatest potential for reductions. Product GHG inventory: A subset of an LCA that focuses only on the climate change impact (i.e. life cycle emissions). A product GHG inventory is a compilation 및 evaluation 의 inputs, outputs, 및 potential GHG impacts of a product system throughout its life cycle. See the GHG Protocol's Product Life Cycle 및 Reporting Standard for further details.

guidance.text:
Life cycle : Consecutive and interlinked stages of a product system, from the acquisition of raw materials or generation of natural resources to end-of-life. 
Life cycle emissions: GHG emissions from a product or service throughout its life cycle.
guidance.textKo: Life cycle: Consecutive 및 interlinked stages of a product system, from the acquisition of raw materials 또는 generation of natural resources to end-of-life. Life cycle emissions: 온실가스 배출량 from a product 또는 service throughout its life cycle.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option selected in column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT completed - 0/5 points
A maximum of 0/5 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 in 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT 완성 - 0/5 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/5점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Any option excluding 'No, and we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' selected in column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 point is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
'No, and we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' selected in column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 0/1 point
A maximum of 0/1 point is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT completed - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 하나 이상 option 제외 'No, 및 we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 경로 B) 'No, 및 we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 0/1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/1점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT 완성 - 0/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/2점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
'Yes' selected in column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 2 points
A maximum of 2/2 points is available for this route.
OR
ROUTE B)
Either 'No, but we plan to start doing so within the next two years' OR 'No, and we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' selected in column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 0/2 points
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT completed - 0/3 points
A maximum of 0/3 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) '예' 선택 in 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 2/2점입니다. 또는 경로 B) Either 'No, but we plan to start doing so within the next two years' 또는 'No, 및 we do not plan to start doing so within the next two years' 선택 in 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' - 0/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/2점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT 완성 - 0/3 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/3점입니다.

criteria.criteria:
ROUTE A)
Full Management points awarded - 1 point
A maximum of 1/1 points is available for this route.
OR
NON-DISCLOSURE ROUTE)
Column 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT completed - 0/2 point
A maximum of 0/2 points is available for this route.
criteria.criteriaKo: 경로 A) 관리에서 최고점 획득 - 1 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 1/1점입니다. 또는 비공개 경로) 열 'Assessment of life cycle emissions' NOT 완성 - 0/2 점 이 경로에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 0/2점입니다.

simpleHelpKo: 이해관계자 are increasingly requesting companies to measure 및 disclose their product- 및 service-related emissions. Emissions are linked to every stage 의 product 또는 service life cycle - from raw material acquisition to end-of-life treatment. Understanding 및 measuring emissions across the life cycle can help companies focus emissions reduction efforts on the most energy intensive operations across the whole life cycle, rather than just in the production 프로세스.
